gaps.snippet: # [doc = " A non-atomic intra-hypha reference-counted handle to a shared immutable value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Backed by [`std::rc::Rc<T>`] for correct non-atomic reference counting within a single hypha."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Sharing model"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " [`clone_ref`](Self::clone_ref) produces a second handle, incrementing the refcount."] # [doc = " [`drop_ref`](Self::drop_ref) decrements the count, probes the outcome, and returns"] # [doc = " an [`RcProbe`]. The caller **must** call `drop_ref` — `RcCell<T>` has no `Drop` impl"] # [doc = " that emits a `ReclamationRecord`; dropping without `drop_ref` silently leaks the audit"] # [doc = " record (G2 violation)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## `!Send + !Sync`"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Inherited from `Rc<T>`: the non-atomic refcount is safe only within one hypha."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Immutability"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `T` is held immutably (LR-8 / DN-32 §2.2). There is no interior-mutation surface."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — sharing and probe logic are deterministic by construction."] # [derive (Debug)] pub struct RcCell < T > { inner : Rc < T > , }

gaps.snippet:
impl < T > RcCell < T > { # [doc = " Allocate a new `RcCell<T>` containing `value` with an initial strong refcount of 1."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — `Rc::new` allocates exactly once."] # [must_use] pub fn new (value : T) -> Self { RcCell { inner : Rc :: new (value) , } } # [doc = " Return the current strong refcount (snapshot, non-atomic)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Use [`drop_ref`](Self::drop_ref) for the reclamation probe — the probe is atomic with"] # [doc = " the decrement. This accessor is for introspection and testing."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — reads `Rc::strong_count` at call time (intra-hypha only)."] # [must_use] pub fn refcount (& self) -> usize { Rc :: strong_count (& self . inner) } # [doc = " Get a reference to the shared value."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — shared reference valid for the lifetime of `&self`."] # [must_use] pub fn value (& self) -> & T { & self . inner } # [doc = " Clone a handle — increment the refcount and return a new `RcCell<T>` pointing to the"] # [doc = " same allocation."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — `Rc::clone` increments the strong count by exactly 1."] # [must_use] pub fn clone_ref (& self) -> RcCell < T > { RcCell { inner : Rc :: clone (& self . inner) , } } # [doc = " Decrement the refcount and return the [`RcProbe`] outcome, consuming this handle."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Probe logic (evaluated on strong count BEFORE decrement)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " - **`strong_count == 1`** → `RcProbe::UniqueOwner(T)`: this IS the last handle."] # [doc = "   Exactly one [`ReclamationRecord`] with `trigger = RcZero` is emitted via `sink`"] # [doc = "   (never-silent G2 / RFC-0027 §9). The owned `T` is extracted and returned."] # [doc = "   `Rc::try_unwrap` is used to extract `T` from the last `Rc` without copying."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " - **`strong_count > 1`** → `RcProbe::Shared`: other handles remain. The `Rc` is dropped"] # [doc = "   (decrementing the count). No record is emitted."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Reclamation context"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `scope_id`, `sweep_epoch`, and `value_meta_hash` anchor the `ReclamationRecord` in the"] # [doc = " RT7 scope tree and the RFC-0008 §4.3 sweep model. These are caller-supplied (KC-3 — no"] # [doc = " global state here); the caller is responsible for correct values."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Never-silent contract (`Exact` within this module)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " When `strong_count == 1`, `sink.emit` is called exactly once. No code path through"] # [doc = " `UniqueOwner` can avoid this call — enforced-by-construction."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — one record emitted on last-ref; none otherwise."] pub fn drop_ref (self , sink : & mut dyn ReclamationSink , scope_id : ScopeId , sweep_epoch : SweepEpoch , value_meta_hash : ContentHash ,) -> RcProbe < T > { let count = Rc :: strong_count (& self . inner) ; if count == 1 { let record = ReclamationRecord :: new (scope_id , sweep_epoch , ReclamationTrigger :: RcZero , value_meta_hash ,) ; sink . emit (record) ; match Rc :: try_unwrap (self . inner) { Ok (value) => RcProbe :: UniqueOwner (value) , Err (_rc) => { panic ! ("RcCell::drop_ref: Rc::try_unwrap failed despite strong_count==1 \
                         (intra-hypha invariant violated — G2)") ; } } } else { drop (self . inner) ; RcProbe :: Shared } } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The outcome of an [`RcCell::drop_ref`] call — the rc-probe decision (RFC-0027 §10.1)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## Variant semantics"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " | Variant | Condition (strong_count before decrement) | Record emitted? |"] # [doc = " |---|---|---|"] # [doc = " | `UniqueOwner(T)` | `strong_count == 1` | Yes — `ReclamationRecord(trigger = RcZero)` |"] # [doc = " | `Shared` | `strong_count > 1` | No |"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## `UniqueOwner` is the `rc → 0` case"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " RFC-0027 §10.1 lists `rc→0` / `rc==1` / `rc>1`. In a drop context, `rc→0` happens exactly"] # [doc = " when `rc` was 1 before the drop — so `UniqueOwner` IS the `rc→0` / `RcZero` event."] # [doc = " The `ReclamationRecord(trigger = RcZero)` is emitted inside `drop_ref`; `UniqueOwner(T)`"] # [doc = " signals to the caller that reclamation occurred and the owned value is available for reuse."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " ## FBIP reuse"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " When `UniqueOwner(T)` is returned, the caller may reuse the `T` value's allocation for the"] # [doc = " next value of compatible shape (FBIP / Perceus `rc==1` reuse — RFC-0027 §10.2). This is a"] # [doc = " `Declared` optimization: no Mycelium perf measurement yet (DN-32 §6a)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — variant is a deterministic function of the refcount before decrement."] # [derive (Debug)] pub enum RcProbe < T > { # [doc = " This handle was the **sole owner** (`rc == 1` before decrement / `rc → 0`)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " A `ReclamationRecord(trigger = RcZero)` has been emitted to the sink exactly once."] # [doc = " The owned value `T` is returned; the caller may inspect it, recurse-reclaim its"] # [doc = " sub-values, or reuse its allocation (FBIP)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — exactly one `ReclamationRecord(RcZero)` was emitted."] UniqueOwner (T) , # [doc = " The refcount was > 1 before decrement; other handles remain."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The `Rc` was dropped (count decremented). No record was emitted."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Guarantee: `Exact` — strong_count >= 1 after decrement."] Shared , }
